title: rosa canina subvar. mollardiana
intro: Rosa canina subvar. mollardiana, also known as a variant of the wild rose, is a plant species within the Rosa canina complex that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. mollardiana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
